title: Event Highlights | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Event Highlights
May 19 2024NYU Shanghai Celebrates the Class of 2024’s GraduationNYU Shanghai celebrates the graduating Class of 2024 in the University's eighth commencement ceremony.Commencement
May 9 2024New Lecture Series Puts Philosophy in the SpotlightThe inaugural Shanghai Lecture on Philosophy will feature Georgetown Professor Huaping Lu-Adler.Conference & Symposium
Apr 25 2024US Secretary of State Antony Blinken Visits NYU Shanghai He spent more than half an hour engaged in an informal conversation with members of the student body. Community
Apr 24 2024Gish Jen Stands Fiction and Nonfiction Side by Side in her Tenth Novel Writer Gish Jen reads from her forthcoming memoir and tenth novel, Bad Bad Girl.Talks
Apr 22 2024Ready, Set, Present! Research Assembly Pushes Limits Students across various disciplines presented their findings at the Postdoctoral and Doctoral Assembly.Research
Apr 18 2024TEDx NYUShanghai Speakers Inspire with “Unfolding Apex”Speakers encouraged us to step out of our comfort zones and explore the rich space between cultures.Student
Mar 29 2024AI for Science: On the Brink of a Scientific BreakthroughHow will AI for Science further ignite interdisciplinary research at NYU Shanghai?Conference & Symposium
Feb 29 2024ICA Opens New Show on "Thinking Africa" Through Film, Workshops, and TranslationNext week a new exhibition on "Thinking Africa" opens at NYU Shanghai’s Institute of Contemporary Arts (ICA).Institute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
Jan 26 2024New Center Launched for Frontiers Science in AI & Deep LearningShanghai Frontiers Science Center of AI & Deep Learning launched at NYU Shanghai.Research
Dec 5 2023Nobel Laureate in Literature Wole Soyinka Visits NYU Shanghai Professor Soyinka shared literature, literary creation, and life with the faculty and students.Talks
Nov 17 2023Nobel Laureate Robert Engle: Hedging Future Risks Through Today's ChoicesRobert Engle visited NYU Shanghai to attend the 2023 VINS Annual Conference.ResearchConference & Symposium
Nov 16 2023Students Showcase Creativity and Business Acumen in Digital Innovation Challenge NYU Shanghai kicked off its second Digital Innovation Challenge (DIC) on October 28.StudentConference & Symposium
Nov 3 2023Violet Pride: NYU Shanghai Teams Compete in Inaugural Qilin CupLast weekend, NYU Shanghai hosted the inaugural Qilin Cup sports invitational.Community
Oct 27 2023Turing Award Winner John Hopcroft Speaks at NYU Shanghai: In the Information Age, Talent is GoldTuring Award winner John Hopcroft talked about universities' missions at NYU Shanghai.Talks
Oct 20 2023Joint Survey Reveals COVID-19’s Impact on American Societal AttitudesA thought-provoking event explored the transformation of Americans’ social attitudes during and after the COVID-19.Research
